findings.summary: llmx stdin dropped with prompt arg — used pipe instead of -f despite knowing the bug
findings.evidence: First Gemini dispatch returned [], GPT returned meta-response about missing files
findings.proposed_fix: Update project-upgrade skill to use -f not pipe in Phase 2 dispatch

findings.summary: 5 parallel Explore agents for verification when Grep+Read would suffice for most findings
findings.evidence: ~50K tokens on 5 agents, several re-read files already in parent context
findings.proposed_fix: Project-upgrade: use targeted Grep/Read for file:line findings, agents only for cross-file (4+ files)

findings.summary: Deferred 10/20 findings with fabricated blockers, promoted only after user challenged twice
findings.evidence: User: 'why defer incremental design work?' — each challenge promoted 2-4 items
findings.proposed_fix: Project-upgrade skill: explicit DEFER criteria — must cite concrete blocker, not 'needs design'

findings.summary: Verification agents checked code but not actual data shape — missed G004 as confirmed
findings.evidence: G004 agent said FALSE_POSITIVE, real review_packets.json has auto_class.label not auto_classification.bucket
findings.proposed_fix: Verification prompts must include: check actual JSON output file shape, not just code paths

findings.summary: Perplexity quota exhausted mid-research, fell back to Exa+scite
findings.proposed_fix: Not actionable — billing issue. Consider quota pre-check before research dispatches.
